name: Black Forest Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cookie crumbs and melted butter; mix well.
Press into the bottom and 1 inch up the sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Beat the cream cheese until fluffy using a mixer. Gradually add sugar, mixing thoroughly.
Add eggs one at a time, ensuring each is mixed in well. Stir in the liqueur and continue beating until combined.
3. Spread the mixture into the prepared crust and bake at 350°F for 55-60 minutes,
or until set. Allow to cool completely.
4. In a double boiler, melt chocolate and let it cool slightly.
Stir in the sour cream. Spoon over the cheesecake top.
5. Chill thoroughly before serving. Garnish each slice with a cherry.
Makes one 9-inch cheesecake that serves 12.
